name: rename_an_emoji
description: Renames an existing custom emoji in a slack workspace, updating all its instances.

name.description:
Current name of the custom emoji to be renamed. Colons (e.g., `:current_emoji:`) are optional.
Examples:
  "current_emoji_name"
  "old_face"

new_name.description:
Desired new name for the custom emoji. Must be unique within the workspace and adhere to Slack's emoji naming conventions.
Examples:
  "new_emoji_name"
  "updated_icon"
